data.content: Implementation complete on branch codex/8c78-overview-tabs at commit 32bc14ed41391936403389f909e2dbdbc9fb3226. Changes: added Work Items, Exploration, Gates, and Terminated tabs with counts; routed ready_for_exploration to Exploration, ready_to_evaluate to Gates, abandoned/deferred/shipped to Terminated, and all remaining visible states to Work Items; narrowed overview columns to a 7rem floor targeting ten columns on desktop; preserved all-repos full ids, single-repo abbreviated ids, lease-record filtering, and active lease info. Verification passed: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test (247 files, 2669 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo); bun run build. Browser checks confirmed Work Items/Exploration/Gates/Terminated routing, 119px columns with 10 visible desktop groups, no page-level overflow at 1269x985 or 390x844, full ids in All Repositories, and corrected left-aligned clipped state badges.
